task.name: API Design Review Task
task.objective: Review REST API design against standards and best practices

critical.mandate: Check naming conventions, HTTP methods, status codes

step.title: Scope
step.action: Ask user for API specification or code to review

step.title: Naming Conventions
step.action: Check resource naming: plural nouns, kebab-case, no verbs in URLs

step.title: HTTP Methods and Status Codes
step.action: Verify correct HTTP method usage: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE

step.title: Error Format and Versioning
step.action: Check error response format follows RFC 7807 or consistent pattern
Verify API versioning strategy (URL, header, or query param)

step.title: Report
step.template-output: Generate API design review report with findings by category (naming, HTTP methods, status codes, error format, versioning), severity levels, and recommendations.
